negative_cases.why_wrong: Table Model Threshold Map: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Table Model Threshold Map: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Table Model Threshold Map: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Table Model Threshold Map: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
